item.title: Celebrate Upcoming #piday!
item.description: Celebrate Upcoming #piday! 3/14 is usually celebrated as pi-day, although it is not recognized as a public holiday (yet). This year, things get a little bit more interesting, as we get two more digits. This happens only once in a century: 3/14/15. Hence, we must celebrate it somehow. What about, tweeting exactly on 3/14/15 9:26:53? Well, that might be early for a saturday morning (for some), and you might miss the exact second even if you’re online.
